title: MCP request for engagement-loop and replay-safe UX experimentation
objective: Enable measurable, deterministic UX experimentation loops that increase return participation without violating traceability or fallback guarantees.
constraints: No runtime rule-engine formula change in governance core.
All experiment outputs must be trace-linked by commit, route, and screenshot hash.
No hidden personalization or nondeterministic verdict path injection.
Fallback path must remain available under all experiment branches.
